name: RPI_DPI_RGB Display Driver
description: This display driver supports displays with 16 bit parallel interfaces, often referred to as "RPI_DPI_RGB" type. These have a parallel interface but no SPI interface and require no configuration of the driver chip.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The interval to re-draw the screen. Defaults to `5s`.

config_entries.label: Data Pins
config_entries.description: A list of pins used for the databus. Specified in 3 groups:

config_entries.label: Blue
config_entries.description: Exactly 5 pin numbers for the blue databits, listed from least to most significant bit.

config_entries.label: Green
config_entries.description: Exactly 6 pin numbers for the green databits, listed from least to most significant bit.

config_entries.label: Red
config_entries.description: Exactly 5 pin numbers for the red databits, listed from least to most significant bit.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Dimensions
config_entries.description: Dimensions of the screen, specified either as *width* **x** *height* (e.g `320x240`  ) or with separate config keys.

config_entries.label: Height
config_entries.description: Specifies height of display in pixels.

config_entries.label: Offset Height
config_entries.description: Specify an offset for the y-direction of the display. Default is 0.

config_entries.label: Offset Width
config_entries.description: Specify an offset for the x-direction of the display, typically used when an LCD is smaller than the maximum supported by the driver chip. Default is 0

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Auto Clear Enabled
config_entries.description: If the display should be cleared before each update. Defaults to `true` if a lambda or pages are configured, false otherwise. or to keep the existing display content (must overwrite explicitly, e.g., only on data change).

config_entries.label: Invert Colors
config_entries.description: With this boolean option you can invert the display colors. **Note** some of the displays have this option set automatically to true and can't be changed.

config_entries.label: Lambda
config_entries.description: The lambda to use for rendering the content on the display. See [Display Rendering Engine](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-engine) for more information.

config_entries.label: Pages
config_entries.description: Show pages instead of a single lambda. See [Display Pages](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-pages).

config_entries.label: PCLK Frequency
config_entries.description: Set the pixel clock speed. Default is 16MHz.

config_entries.label: PCLK Inverted
config_entries.description: If the pclk is active negative (default is True)

config_entries.label: Rotation
config_entries.description: Rotate the display presentation in software. Choose one of `0°`, `90°`, `180°`, or `270°`.
